6) Physics  —  Multiple Choice    Paul is simulating a moving object, and can adjust its speed, density, and volume. He wants to cut its speed in half while keeping its kinetic energy constant. Which of the following other changes could he make to keep the kinetic energy constant?
W) Double the volume
X) Double the density
Y) Double both the volume and the density
Z) Double the volume and quadruple the density
label: TOSSUP_TEXT

text: ANSWER: Y) DOUBLE BOTH THE VOLUME AND THE DENSITY
label: TOSSUP_ANSWER
